screen.mysticrealm.obelisk.title: Vampire Obelisk
mysticrealm.configuration.title: MysticRealm Configuration
mysticrealm.configuration.hud.abilityWhe: Scale of the vampire ability wheel (0.5 - 3.0). 2.0 = default size.
mysticrealm.configuration.general.debugL: Enable debug messages in the console.
mysticrealm.configuration.vampire.bloodD: Amount of blood (0-20 scale) drained passively per interval.
How often (in seconds) blood drains passively while the player is a vampire.
mysticrealm.configuration.vampire.sunlig: Whether vampires take damage in direct sunlight.
Seconds a Blood Sovereign can survive in sunlight. Newborns always die instantly.
mysticrealm.configuration.vampire.regene: Minimum blood level (0-20) required for passive regeneration.
mysticrealm.configuration.vampire.speedT: Minimum blood level (0-20) required for passive speed boost.
mysticrealm.configuration.vampire.immort: Vampires cannot die from ordinary causes; only supernatural weaknesses are lethal.
mysticrealm.configuration.vampire.minimu: Health the vampire is reduced to when immortality triggers (0.5 = half a heart).
mysticrealm.configuration.vampire.nearDe: How long (in ticks) the near-death debuffs last. 600 = 30 seconds.
mysticrealm.configuration.vampire.entity: Fraction of max blood regenerated per regen interval. 0.05 = 5% per interval.
Ticks between each blood regeneration tick for entities. 1200 = 60 seconds.
mysticrealm.configuration.vampire.exsang: Damage dealt per drain interval when an entity's blood pool is empty.
mysticrealm.configuration.vampire.bloodD: Blood removed from a target's pool every 5 ticks during active draining.
mysticrealm.configuration.vampire.progre: Vampire Progression
Enable Vampire Progression
Enable the rank/essence/ascension progression system for vampires.
Track Vampire Age
Track how long a player has been a vampire (in ticks).
Newborn → Neophyte Essence
Blood essence required to ascend from Newborn to Neophyte.
Neophyte → Vampire Essence
Blood essence required to ascend from Neophyte to Vampire.
Vampire → Elder Essence
Blood essence required to ascend from Vampire to Elder.
Elder → Vampire Lord Essence
Blood essence required to ascend from Elder to Vampire Lord.
Vampire Lord → Prince of Night Essence
Blood essence required to ascend from Vampire Lord to Prince of Night.
Prince of Night → Blood Sovereign Essence
Blood essence required to ascend from Prince of Night to Blood Sovereign.
Newborn → Neophyte Min Age (h)
Minimum vampire age in hours to ascend from Newborn to Neophyte.
Neophyte → Vampire Min Age (h)
Minimum vampire age in hours to ascend from Neophyte to Vampire.
Vampire → Elder Min Age (h)
Minimum vampire age in hours to ascend from Vampire to Elder.
Elder → Vampire Lord Min Age (h)
Minimum vampire age in hours to ascend from Elder to Vampire Lord.
Vampire Lord → Prince of Night Min Age (h)
Minimum vampire age in hours to ascend from Vampire Lord to Prince of Night.
Prince of Night → Blood Sovereign Min Age (h)
Minimum vampire age in hours to ascend from Prince of Night to Blood Sovereign.
Whether Hostile Vampires spawn naturally in the world. Disable/enable takes effect at runtime.
Relative spawn weight (Enderman is ~10, Zombie is ~100). Changes require a restart.
Minimum number of Hostile Vampires per spawn group. Changes require a restart.
Maximum number of Hostile Vampires per spawn group. Changes require a restart.
mysticrealm.configuration.infection.infe: Duration of the vampiric infection effect in seconds. The player must die within this time to become a vampire.
mysticrealm.configuration.infection.enab: If true, players in Hardcore mode will be transformed into vampires instead of dying permanently.
mysticrealm.vampire.infection.start: Your veins begin to burn with an ancient curse...
